title: Peppery Gooey Ginger Midnight Craving JAIN-FRIENDLY Stir-fry
description: A dutch dish featuring cloves and ginger to satisfy midnight cravings with a spicy and gooey texture suitable for those following a jain-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: Clove
ingredients.notes: Cloves can be ground to a fine powder if using whole cloves for easier blending

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Regular soy sauce is preferred, but tamari or gluten-free alternative could work as well

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: High smoke point for stir-frying and flavor infusion

instructions: Blend ginger, ground cloves, soy sauce, water, and oil in a food processor until smooth.
Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add chopped green onions and peanuts/almonds (if using), tossing for about 1 minute to warm them up.
Pour the blended spice mixture into the hot pan with the vegetables and toss well to coat evenly.
Stir-fry until most of the liquid evaporates and the dish is thickened, approximately 5-7 minutes. Serve immediately while still gooey.
